ManagerDoctor_C.name: Manager Chief Doctor
ManagerDoctor_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality type to increase the power they provide!

ManagerDoctor_R.name: Manager Chief Doctor
ManagerDoctor_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality type to increase the power they provide!

ManagerDoctor_SR_kingsly.name: Marlin Kingsly
ManagerDoctor_SR_kingsly.description: In addition to being an exceptional doctor, Mr. Kingsly is an eloquent speaker who won't back down in the face of opposition. Kingsly is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad.

ManagerDoctor_SR_noctor.name: Gregson "Noctor" Holmes
ManagerDoctor_SR_noctor.description: Cagey and challenging to work with, Dr. Holmes is nonetheless a brilliant doctor who thinks outside the box. Noctor is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad.

ManagerDoctor_SR_treky.name: May "Treky" Jenson
ManagerDoctor_SR_treky.description: May's an accomplished and versatile doctor capable of performing any task that stands before her. Treky is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad.

ManagerDoctor_UC.name: Manager Chief Doctor
ManagerDoctor_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality type to increase the power they provide!

ManagerDoctor_VR.name: Manager Chief Doctor
ManagerDoctor_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality type to increase the power they provide!

ManagerEngineer_C.name: Manager Chief Engineer
ManagerEngineer_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Corps of Engineering squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerEngineer_R.name: Manager Chief Engineer
ManagerEngineer_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Corps of Engineering squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerEngineer_SR_countess.name: Lacey "Countess" Ads
ManagerEngineer_SR_countess.description: Equally known for her regal demeanour and intelligence, Countess is one of the key engineers behind Vindertech's systems. Countess is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Corps of Engineering squad.

ManagerEngineer_SR_maths.name: Emma "Maths" Nolen
ManagerEngineer_SR_maths.description: One of the smartest people on the planet, Emma earned the nickname "Maths' as a kid because her friends joked she could probably figure out a way to kill them with numbers. Maths is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Corps of Engineering squad.

ManagerEngineer_SR_sobs.name: Jeev Sobs
ManagerEngineer_SR_sobs.description: A dreamer driven by a great mind, Mr. Sobs is an engineering powerhouse. Jeev is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Corps of Engineering squad.

ManagerEngineer_UC.name: Manager Chief Engineer
ManagerEngineer_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Corps of Engineering squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerEngineer_VR.name: Manager Chief Engineer
ManagerEngineer_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Corps of Engineering squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerExplorer_C.name: Manager Chief Explorer
ManagerExplorer_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Scouting Party squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerExplorer_R.name: Manager Chief Explorer
ManagerExplorer_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Scouting Party squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerExplorer_SR_birdie.name: Saka "Birdie" Gale
ManagerExplorer_SR_birdie.description: Saka is one of the most experienced explorers alive. It's said she glides like a bird across the land. Saka is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Scouting Party squad.

ManagerExplorer_SR_eagle.name: Amy "Eagle" Deerhart
ManagerExplorer_SR_eagle.description: As a child, Amy dreamed of soaring through the skies like an eagle, and that drive led to her becoming an expert explorer. Eagle is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Scouting Party squad.

ManagerExplorer_SR_spacebound.name: Ned "SpaceBound" Legstrong
ManagerExplorer_SR_spacebound.description: Ned is often credited as the first man to walk on Venus, but naysayers doubt the truth of his legacy. Spacebound is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Scouting Party squad.

ManagerExplorer_UC.name: Manager Chief Explorer
ManagerExplorer_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Scouting Party squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerExplorer_VR.name: Manager Chief Explorer
ManagerExplorer_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Scouting Party squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerGadgeteer_C.name: Manager Chief Gadgeteer
ManagerGadgeteer_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Gadgeteers squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerGadgeteer_R.name: Manager Chief Gadgeteer
ManagerGadgeteer_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Gadgeteers squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerGadgeteer_SR_fixer.name: Hamlet "Fixer" McKinney
ManagerGadgeteer_SR_fixer.description: After spending countless hours tinkering in his lab, Hamlet discovered that all problems can be solved with some duct tape and a paper clip. Fixer is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Gadgeteers squad.

ManagerGadgeteer_SR_flak.name: Kelly "Flak" Solek
ManagerGadgeteer_SR_flak.description: Known for making tremendous advances in personal safety technology, Kelly doesn't take flak from anyone. Kelly is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Gadgeteers squad.

ManagerGadgeteer_SR_zapps.name: Ellie "Zapps" Clerk
ManagerGadgeteer_SR_zapps.description: Ellie is a pioneer in her field, and designed many of the tools that a modern Gadgeteer wouldn't want to do without. Ellie provides increased power in The Gadgeteers squad.

ManagerGadgeteer_UC.name: Manager Chief Gadgeteer
ManagerGadgeteer_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Gadgeteers squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerGadgeteer_VR.name: Manager Chief Gadgeteer
ManagerGadgeteer_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Gadgeteers squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerInventor_C.name: Chief Manager Inventor
ManagerInventor_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in The Think Tank squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerInventor_R.name: Chief Manager Inventor
ManagerInventor_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in The Think Tank squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerInventor_SR_frequency.name: Nick "Frequency" Golub
ManagerInventor_SR_frequency.description: Nick likes electricity. He's invented more ways to zap people and things than any other person alive. Nick provides increased power in the Think Tank squad.

ManagerInventor_SR_rad.name: Cary "Rad" Mary
ManagerInventor_SR_rad.description: Cary has a long history researching and experimenting with dangerous materials. Cary is a lead survivor that provides increased power in The Think Tank squad.

ManagerInventor_SR_square.name: Alfred "Square" Winestein
ManagerInventor_SR_square.description: Alfred is all about relativity and fitting things in squares. Alfred is a lead survivor that provides increased power in The Think Tank squad.

ManagerInventor_UC.name: Chief Manager Inventor
ManagerInventor_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in The Think Tank squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerInventor_VR.name: Chief Manager Inventor
ManagerInventor_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in The Think Tank squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerMartialArtist_C.name: Manager Chief Martial Artist
ManagerMartialArtist_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Close Assault Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerMartialArtist_R.name: Manager Chief Martial Artist
ManagerMartialArtist_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Close Assault Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerMartialArtist_SR_dragon.name: Sie "Dragon" Lung
ManagerMartialArtist_SR_dragon.description: Sie's small stature can be misleading, as he is a true martial arts master. Dragon is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Close Assault Squad.

ManagerMartialArtist_SR_samurai.name: Mishiro "Samurai" Tofune
ManagerMartialArtist_SR_samurai.description: After years of training in the ancient arts of the samurai, Tofune considered becoming an actor. That thought didn't last long, because he was considered too authentic and scary for the screen. Samurai is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Close Assault Squad.

ManagerMartialArtist_SR_tiger.name: Misha "Tiger" Yu
ManagerMartialArtist_SR_tiger.description: Fierce as it is, Misha's nickname is but a small flicker of his inner fire. Misha's Tiger spirit provides increased power in the Close Assault Squad.

ManagerMartialArtist_UC.name: Manager Chief Martial Artist
ManagerMartialArtist_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Close Assault Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerMartialArtist_VR.name: Manager Chief Martial Artist
ManagerMartialArtist_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Close Assault Squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerSoldier_C.name: Manager Chief Soldier
ManagerSoldier_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Fire Team Alpha squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerSoldier_R.name: Manager Chief Soldier
ManagerSoldier_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Fire Team Alpha squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerSoldier_SR_malcolm.name: Malcolm
ManagerSoldier_SR_malcolm.description: With his calm pride and strong sense of loyalty, Malcolm is a true survivor and a born leader. Malcolm is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Fire Team Alpha squad.

ManagerSoldier_SR_princess.name: Lacy "Princess" Luw
ManagerSoldier_SR_princess.description: A natural soldier, Lacy has a background as a special ops infiltrator, although she preferred busting down the front door. Princess is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Fire Team Alpha squad.

ManagerSoldier_SR_ramsie.name: Joe "Ramsie" Bo
ManagerSoldier_SR_ramsie.description: Joe once beat a man in a bar fight, but he swears he didn't draw first blood. Ramsie is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Fire Team Alpha squad.

ManagerSoldier_UC.name: Manager Chief Soldier
ManagerSoldier_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Fire Team Alpha squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerSoldier_VR.name: Manager Chief Soldier
ManagerSoldier_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power in the Fire Team Alpha squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerTrainer_C.name: Manager Chief Personal Trainer
ManagerTrainer_C.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power when assigned to the Training Team squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerTrainer_R.name: Manager Chief Personal Trainer
ManagerTrainer_R.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power when assigned to the Training Team squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerTrainer_SR_jumpy.name: Damon "Sprawl" Fitch
ManagerTrainer_SR_jumpy.description: A retired kickboxing champ, Damon is the type of personal trainer you don't ignore. If he wants five more reps... he gets five more reps. Damon provides increased power in the Training Team Squad.

ManagerTrainer_SR_raider.name: Cara "Indiana" Loft
ManagerTrainer_SR_raider.description: Cara's curiosity leads her to so many adventures that her friends started calling her Indiana. Indiana is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Training Team squad.

ManagerTrainer_SR_yoglattes.name: Michelle "Yoglattes" Jillard
ManagerTrainer_SR_yoglattes.description: A passionate coffee and yoga enthusiast, Michelle opened the world’s first Hot Coffee Yoga studio, Yoglattes. The studio closed following multiple yoglawsuits. Yoglattes is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the Training Team squad.

ManagerTrainer_UC.name: Manager Chief Personal Trainer
ManagerTrainer_UC.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power when assigned to the Training Team squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerTrainer_VR.name: Manager Chief Personal Trainer
ManagerTrainer_VR.description: A lead survivor that provides increased power when assigned to the Training Team squad. Assign to a squad with survivors of the same personality to increase the power they provide!

ManagerQuestDoctor_R.name: Dr. Blackwell
ManagerQuestDoctor_R.description: An ambitious and inventive EMT lead, Dr. Blackwell's “cut first, ask questions later” approach to medicine is terrifyingly effective. Blackwell is a lead survivor that provides increased power in the EMT Squad.

WorkerBasic_C.name: WorkerBasic_C_T01
WorkerBasic_C.description: Assign this Survivor to a Squad to increase Squad power and gain Fortitude, Offense, Resistance or Tech. Assign {Gender}|gender(him, her) to a squad where the Lead Survivor is [Worker.Personality] to gain more power. Match set bonuses with other Survivors to gain [Worker.SetBonus.Buff].

WorkerHalloween_ALT_SR.description: One of the winners from this year's Husk Costume Party! You don't know why they're still wearing their costume, but they're good at their jobs!

Worker_Joel_UR.name: Joel
Worker_Joel_UR.description: Joel is beloved by the survivors of Homebase for his humor, unbelievable stories, and stubbornly joyful approach to life.

Worker_Karolina_UR.name: Karolina
Worker_Karolina_UR.description: Karolina is beloved by the survivors of Homebase for her passion, bravery, and uncompromising badassery.

Worker_Leprechaun_VR.name: Leprechaun
Worker_Leprechaun_VR.description: Is that Wee Crumblesnacks O'Plenty?! Nope, it's the winner of this year's Spring It On! Leprechaun costume contest.
